recommendations.title: The Bitter Tears of Petra von Kant
recommendations.overview: Petra von Kant is a successful fashion designer -- arrogant, caustic, and self-satisfied. She mistreats Marlene (her secretary, maid, and co-designer). Enter Karin, a 23-year-old beauty who wants to be a model. Petra falls in love with Karin and invi

recommendations.title: Frank & Lola
recommendations.overview: A talented Las Vegas chef falls in love with an aspiring fashion designer but turns violently jealous when he realizes that she's hiding dark secrets.

recommendations.title: Love Tactics
recommendations.overview: An ad executive and a fashion designer-blogger don't believe in love, so they place a bet to make the other fall head over heels - with unusual tactics.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: The Face of Love
recommendations.overview: A widow falls for a guy who bears a striking resemblance to her late husband.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Love.com
recommendations.overview: It's a love story between a fashion blogger and a video game blogger. The beauty and the nerd.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: The Mistress of Spices
